title: A 1-night operant learning task without food-restriction differentiates among mouse strains in an automated home-cage environment

screening.reason: The study uses automated home-cage monitoring but focuses on operant learning rather than social behavior.
matched_inclusion_criteria: Studies mice in a home-cage setting
matched_exclusion_criteria: No automated monitoring of social behavior

overall_concept_summary: The study evaluates mouse strain differences using an operant learning task without food restriction in an automated home-cage environment.
methods_summary: Mice were monitored in a home-cage setting for one night, and the operant learning performance was assessed through a task that did not involve food restriction.
results_summary: Different mouse strains showed varying performances on the operant learning task, indicating strain-specific differences in cognitive abilities.
conclusion_summary: Automated home-cage monitoring can effectively differentiate among mouse strains based on their operant learning performance without the need for food restriction.
relevance_to_review: Weakly relevant as it uses automated home-cage monitoring but focuses on operant learning rather than social behavior.
key_takeaways: Automated home-cage monitoring is effective for differentiating mouse strains in cognitive tasks.
Food restriction is not necessary for such assessments.
objective: To differentiate among mouse strains using an operant learning task without food restriction in an automated home-cage environment.
intervention_or_exposure: Operant learning task without food restriction
outcomes_measured: Operant learning performance across different mouse strains
main_results: Mouse strains showed varying performances on the operant learning task.
conclusions: Automated home-cage monitoring can effectively differentiate among mouse strains based on their cognitive abilities without food restriction.
limitations: The study focuses on cognitive rather than social behavior, limiting its relevance to the review question.
missing_information: No abstract or full text available for detailed summary and other specific information extraction.
